prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KP-RCRACECAR-11INCH-PARENT Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 1:64 Scale Remote Control Race Car Toy Vehicle Playset with Lights, Ages 3+ Description: Know a little need for speed race car fanatic? This battery operated RC race car from Kidplokio is fitted with fast-moving wheels, flashing taillights, cool graphics and of course a remote control unit to race this RC car kids toy across the finish line. The sleek, aerodynamic profile and illuminating taillights will inspire little drivers to speed past the competition and place on the podium.

The RC car is lightweight, durable, speedy and quick to respond to the remote controller; measuring just 11 inches in length, the RC car is a great toy car for young kids and toddlers to handle and manage safely. The easy to operate remote controller allows kids to move the toy car forward, back, left and right, while flashing taillights illuminate as they speed along the race track. The remote control unit measures 4 inches wide x 3 inches tall with easy to reach buttons, designed with small hands in mind.

Hours of pretend play await, as little competitors get ready to race in their own Indy 500 or compete against friends or siblings. And, not only does the toy car mean hours of awesome driving, they'll be engaging in crucial early developmental activities like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as challenging their cognitive development through fast-paced and reactive imaginative playtime sessions.

Comprised of high-quality, non-toxic plastic material, this Remote Control Race Car Toy Vehicle Playset with Lights from Kidplokio, will stand up well to lots of racing wear and tear, and makes an awesome Christmas gift or Hanukkah gift for any little race car fanatic in your life.

Batteries Required: x5 1.5V AA

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys big present cool gifts under 100 dollars christmas hanukkah learning indy race car formula 1 vehicle rc remote control fast speedster action activity older kids tween teen scaled lightup realistic classic play outside outdoor Features: - COMPACT RC RACE CAR: Know a little need for speed race car fanatic? This battery operated RC race car from Kidplokio is fitted with fast-moving wheels, flashing taillights, cool graphics and of course, a remote control unit to speed this RC car across the finish line and earn a place on the podium! - FAST RC CAR WITH FLASHING TAILLIGHTS: The RC race car is lightweight, durable, speedy and quick to respond to the remote control unit; the easy to operate remote controller allows the driver to move the vehicle forward, back, left and right - EASY TO USE RC RACE CAR: Measuring 11 inches, the RC car is a fun toy for young kids and toddlers to handle and manage safely; the remote control unit measures 4 inches wide x 3 inches tall with easy to reach buttons, designed with small hands in mind! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Hours of pretend play await, as little competitors get ready to participate in their own Indy 500 race! In addition to racing fun, kids will be engaging in crucial early developmental activities like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as challenging their cognitive development with fast-paced and reactive imaginative playtime sessions - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 4 x 3 inches; Colors: Black or Blue; Weight: 0.95lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Batteries Required: x5 1.5V AA; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
